subject: Project Management
title: The Kanban Board in Software
description: A 60-second lesson on The Kanban Board in Software.

hook.text: Software teams took Toyota's kanban cards and turned them into sticky notes on a whiteboard.

buildup.text: Columns might be: Backlog → Analysis → Dev → Code Review → Testing → Done.

discovery.text: Each sticky note is a work item. Its position shows exactly where it is in the process.

twist.text: Digital tools like Trello and Jira made boards accessible — but lost the tactile power of physical cards.

climax.text: Whether physical or digital, the board is the team's single source of truth.

punchline.text: One board. One truth. No status meetings needed.

quiz.question: What is a software Kanban board's primary function?
options: Showing where every work item is in the process
